summary: Tested Assets & Liabilities module, Partner P&L Report, and Mobile Bottom Tab Bar. Fixed critical bug in Add Asset dialog. All 14 backend API tests passed. Frontend features verified and working.

issues: Expenses card shows 'SAR NaN' when no data - should show 'SAR 0' or empty state

action_items: Fix 'SAR NaN' display in Partner P&L Report expenses card (handle null/undefined values)

empty_select_value_crash.issue: Add Asset dialog crashed with 'A <Select.Item /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string' error when opening dialog
empty_select_value_crash.fix: Changed Branch SelectItem from value='' to value='none' and updated onValueChange to convert 'none' back to empty string

seed_data_creation: Existing test data: 'Delivery Van' asset (SAR 85,000 purchase, 15% depreciation), 1 active loan (SAR 95,000), 2 unpaid fines (SAR 2,000 total), 3 expired documents
context_for_next_testing_agent: Assets & Liabilities module fully working. Key endpoints: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/assets, GET /api/assets/stats, GET /api/assets/depreciation-report, GET /api/liabilities/summary, POST/GET /api/assets/{id}/maintenance. Partner P&L Report at /partner-pl-report. Mobile bottom tab bar visible on viewports <1024px width.

asset_stats.details: Returns total_assets, total_purchase_value, total_current_value, total_depreciation, by_type, by_status

depreciation_report.details: Returns detailed depreciation data with summary

liabilities_summary.details: Aggregates loans, fines, supplier dues, document alerts

asset_maintenance.details: Maintenance logging and history retrieval working

assets_page_ui.details: Page loads with summary cards, three tabs (Assets, Liabilities, Depreciation), Add Asset dialog working after fix

partner_pl_report.details: Page loads with filters, summary cards, tabs for Partner Breakdown, Expense Categories, Payment Modes

mobile_bottom_nav.details: Shows on mobile viewport with Home, Sales, Expenses, Stock, Reports, More tabs
